title: alchemilla alpina subvar. nitida
intro: Alchemilla alpina subvar. nitida, also known as the shining lady's mantle or glossy alpine lady's mantle, is a plant species within the genus Alchemilla. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have a number of health benefits, including reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality due to its sedative and calming effects. Alchemilla alpina subvar. nitida can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
